Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

Information We Collect

We collect minimal information. When you visit FetchPicks, we may collect:

  • Basic analytics data (pages visited, time on site, referral source) via privacy-focused analytics.
  • Information you voluntarily provide via contact forms or email.

Cookies

We use minimal cookies for site functionality. We do not use intrusive tracking cookies. Amazon affiliate links use cookies to track referrals for commission purposes. These cookies are set by Amazon, not by us.

Third-Party Services

FetchPicks uses:

  • Cloudflare — for CDN and security (privacy-focused).
  • Amazon Associates — for affiliate program cookie tracking.

Your Rights

You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of any personal data we hold. Contact us at hello@fetchpicks.com for any privacy-related requests.

Contact

For privacy inquiries: hello@fetchpicks.com

🐾 FetchPicks

We help pet owners make smarter buying decisions with honest, research-backed product reviews and guides.

FetchPicks is a participant in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means for sites to earn advertising fees by advertising and linking to Amazon.com. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases.
